author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iteration (2026-05-09): 2 Tier-3 docs added.

mm/page-cache.md (219 lines, 15 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) — filemap xarray + folio operations + readahead + truncate. address_space_operations vtable byte-identity preserved for fs/* compat.

mm/reclaim.md (215 lines, 13 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) — vmscan + classic LRU + MGLRU + shrinker framework + kswapd + oom_kill. Owns mm/00-overview.md's mandatory L3 LRU + memcg consistency invariants.

Total Tier-3: 18. Phase C running via /loop dynamic mode (270s heartbeat); user can interrupt anytime.
